metadata.title: Background Remover - Transparent PNG Maker
metadata.description: Remove image backgrounds and create transparent PNG cutouts for product photos, profile images, and design assets.

shell.footerDescription: Remove image backgrounds and export transparent PNG cutouts.

hero.title: Background Remover
hero.description: Upload a product photo, portrait, or design asset. Get a clean foreground cutout with transparent pixels in one PNG.

beforeTransparent.title: Make the result obvious before anyone uploads.
beforeTransparent.description: The workbench uses a checkerboard preview because that is the product: a subject cut out from its old background and ready for a catalog, marketplace, deck, or design canvas.

useCases.title: Built for image cutouts, not a heavy editor.
useCases.description: V1 stays narrow: upload one image, remove the background, download a transparent PNG. Batch tools and background replacement can wait.

privacy.title: Privacy-aware retention
privacy.description: Uploaded images are used to create your transparent PNG result, not to train AI models. Results expire according to your plan.

cta.title: More images to process each month?
cta.description: Free users can try the workflow. Paid plans raise monthly volume, upload size, and retention for repeat product image work.

workbench.invalidTypeError: Use a PNG, JPG, JPEG, or WebP image.
workbench.fileTooLargeError: Use an image under 20MB. Free plans may have lower limits.
workbench.openError: This image could not be opened.
workbench.defaultProcessError: The image could not be processed.
workbench.uploadDescription: Drag in a photo or choose one from your device. The output is a transparent PNG, ready to download.
workbench.runRemovalHint: Run removal to generate a transparent PNG.
workbench.emptyPreviewDescription: The result area keeps the transparent checkerboard visible so the PNG behavior is obvious.
